content: Lokasi sangat strategis, dekat Stasiun Bandung, depan hotel berjejer toko makanan, sebelah toko oleh-oleh. Staff hotel sangat ramah & sangat membantu dalam proses check in/out, membantu membawakan barang sampai ke kamar, membantu menyeberangkan jalan yang sangat padat ramai. Hotel sangat rapi, bersih & wangi. Alhamdulillah, sangat recommended. Terima kasih semua 🙏

I love the location.. close to town.. for families with small children can swim the pool. there is no breakfast at the hotel. but breakfast shops around the hotel
Nice view for the ootd..

Room is clean with a minimalist modern design, equipped with standard toiletries, electric kettle, hairdryer and tv, aircon works perfectly, and comfy beds. Service is excellent and price is reasonable, although water pressure needs improvement but I will for sure be staying here when I am in Bandung.
Lokasi dekat dengan pusat kuliner. Seberang hotel banyak makanan enak, pusat oleh-oleh Kartikasari. Kamar luas & cukup bersih, walaupun interior cukup vintage.
Tempatnya ideal sekali, tempat makan di mana mana. Mantep, mau sekoteng, bandrek apa aja ada
